case_title: SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS vs. BROWN, YOLANDA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, YOLANDA JOUBERT, KENNETH BROWN, PERLONIOUS NELSON, GARY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

COURT RULED ON THE BENCH. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF TO PRE- PARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, YOLANDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 15 ESPANOLA ST, #4 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124 $54.00 RENT, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $159.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-03-1995, LEASE FORFEITED
